verses.1: The words of King Lemuel, the pronouncement which his mother taught him:
verses.2: What, my son? And what, son of my womb? And what, son of my vows?
verses.3: Do not give your strength to women, Or your ways to that which destroys kings.
verses.4: It is not for kings, Lemuel, It is not for kings to drink wine, Or for rulers to desire intoxicating drink,
verses.5: Otherwise they will drink and forget what is decreed, And pervert the rights of all the needy.
verses.6: Give intoxicating drink to one who is perishing, And wine to one whose life is bitter.
verses.7: Let him drink and forget his poverty, And remember his trouble no more.
verses.8: Open your mouth for the people who cannot speak, For the rights of all the unfortunate.
verses.9: Open your mouth, judge righteously, And defend the rights of the poor and needy.
verses.10: An excellent wife, who can find her? For her worth is far above jewels.
verses.11: The heart of her husband trusts in her, And he will have no lack of gain.
verses.12: She does him good and not evil All the days of her life.
verses.13: She looks for wool and linen, And works with her hands in delight.
verses.14: She is like merchant ships; She brings her food from afar.
verses.15: And she rises while it is still night And gives food to her household, And portions to her attendants.
verses.16: She considers a field and buys it; From her earnings she plants a vineyard.
verses.17: She surrounds her waist with strength And makes her arms strong.
verses.18: She senses that her profit is good; Her lamp does not go out at night.
verses.19: She stretches out her hands to the distaff, And her hands grasp the spindle.
verses.20: She extends her hand to the poor, And she stretches out her hands to the needy.
verses.21: She is not afraid of the snow for her household, For all her household are clothed with scarlet.
verses.22: She makes coverings for herself; Her clothing is fine linen and purple.
verses.23: Her husband is known in the gates, When he sits among the elders of the land.
verses.24: She makes linen garments and sells them, And supplies belts to the tradesmen.
verses.25: Strength and dignity are her clothing, And she smiles at the future.
verses.26: She opens her mouth in wisdom, And the teaching of kindness is on her tongue.
verses.27: She watches over the activities of her household, And does not eat the bread of idleness.
verses.28: Her children rise up and bless her; Her husband also, and he praises her, saying:
verses.29: “Many daughters have done nobly, But you excel them all.”
verses.30: Charm is deceitful and beauty is vain, But a woman who fears the LORD, she shall be praised.
verses.31: Give her the product of her hands, And let her works praise her in the gates.
